{"text": "Taking Play Seriously\nBy ROBIN MARANTZ HENIG\nPublished: February 17, 2008\nOn a drizzly Tuesday night in late January, 200 people came out to hear a psychiatrist talk rhapsodically about play -- not just the intense, joyous play of children, but play for all people, at all ages, at all times. (All species too; the lecture featured touching photos of a polar bear and a husky engaging playfully at a snowy outpost in northern Canada.) Stuart Brown, president of the National Institute for Play, was speaking at the New York Public Library's main branch on 42nd Street. He created the institute in 1996, after more than 20 years of psychiatric practice and research persuaded him of the dangerous long-term consequences of play deprivation. In a sold-out talk at the library, he and Krista Tippett, host of the public-radio program ''Speaking of Faith,'' discussed the biological and spiritual underpinnings of play. Brown called play part of the ''developmental sequencing of becoming a human primate. If you look at what produces learning and memory and well-being, play is as fundamental as any other aspect of life, including sleep and dreams.''\nThe message seemed to resonate with audience members, who asked anxious questions about what seemed to be the loss of play in their children's lives. Their concern came, no doubt, from the recent deluge of eulogies to play . Educators fret that school officials are hacking away at recess to make room for an increasingly crammed curriculum. Psychologists complain that overscheduled kids have no time left for the real business of childhood: idle, creative, unstructured free play. Public health officials link insufficient playtime to a rise in childhood obesity. Parents bemoan the fact that kids don't play the way they themselves did -- or think they did. And everyone seems to worry that without the chance to play stickball or hopscotch out on the street, to play with dolls on the kitchen floor or climb trees in the woods, today's children are missing out on something essential.\nThe success of ''The Dangerous Book for Boys'' -- which has been on the best-seller list for the last nine months -- and its step-by-step instructions for activities like folding paper airplanes is testament to the generalized longing for play's good old days. So were the questions after Stuart Brown's library talk; one woman asked how her children will learn trust, empathy and social skills when their most frequent playing is done online. Brown told her that while video games do have some play value, a true sense of ''interpersonal nuance'' can be achieved only by a child who is engaging all five senses by playing in the three-dimensional world.\nThis is part of a larger conversation Americans are having about play. Parents bobble between a nostalgia-infused yearning for their children to play and fear that time spent playing is time lost to more practical pursuits. Alarming headlines about U.S. students falling behind other countries in science and math, combined with the ever-more-intense competition to get kids into college, make parents rush to sign up their children for piano lessons and test-prep courses instead of just leaving them to improvise on their own; playtime versus r?m?uilding.\nDiscussions about play force us to reckon with our underlying ideas about childhood, sex differences, creativity and success. Do boys play differently than girls? Are children being damaged by staring at computer screens and video games? Are they missing something when fantasy play is populated with characters from Hollywood's imagination and not their own? Most of these issues are too vast to be addressed by a single field of study (let alone a magazine article). But the growing science of play does have much to add to the conversation. Armed with research grounded in evolutionary biology and experimental neuroscience, some scientists have shown themselves eager -- at times perhaps a little too eager -- to promote a scientific argument for play. They have spent the past few decades learning how and why play evolved in animals, generating insights that can inform our understanding of its evolution in humans too. They are studying, from an evolutionary perspective, to what extent play is a luxury that can be dispensed with when there are too many other competing claims on the growing brain, and to what extent it is central to how that brain grows in the first place.\nScientists who study play, in animals and humans alike, are developing a consensus view that play is something more than a way for restless kids to work off steam; more than a way for chubby kids to burn off calories; more than a frivolous luxury. import gc
import typing as tp
from dataclasses import dataclass
import numpy as np
import torch
from wtpsplit import SaT
def adaptive_split_by_priority(
    text: str,
    probs: np.ndarray,
    max_length: int,
    tokenizer=None,
    use_tokens=False
) -> tp.Tuple[tp.List[str], tp.List[float]]:
    """
    完全自适应的分割算法
    
    返回:
        sentences: 分割后的句子列表
        split_probs: 每个分割点的概率列表（最后一个句子的概率为-1）
    """
    
    def get_length(s: str) -> int:
        if not s:
            return 0
        if use_tokens:
            return len(tokenizer.encode(s, add_special_tokens=False))
        return len(s)
    
    # 按概率降序排序所有候选点
    candidates = sorted(enumerate(probs), key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True)
    
    # 初始状态：整个文本是一个片段
    segments = [(0, len(text))]
    split_points = {}  # {split_idx: prob}
    
    # 贪心地添加分割点
    for split_idx, prob in candidates:
        # 找到包含此分割点的超长片段
        for i, (start, end) in enumerate(segments):
            if start <= split_idx < end - 1:
                if get_length(text[start:end]) > max_length:
                    # 在此位置分割
                    segments[i:i+1] = [
                        (start, split_idx + 1),
                        (split_idx + 1, end)
                    ]
                    split_points[split_idx] = prob
                    break
        
        # 检查是否所有片段都满足要求
        if all(get_length(text[s:e]) <= max_length for s, e in segments):
            break
    
    # 构建返回结果
    sentences = []
    split_probs = []
    
    for start, end in segments:
        if start < end:
            sentences.append(text[start:end])
            # 获取该句子结束位置的概率（end-1 是最后一个字符的索引）
            if end - 1 in split_points:
                split_probs.append(float(split_points[end - 1]))
            else:
                split_probs.append(-1.0)  # 最后一个句子或未使用模型分割的位置
    
    return sentences, split_probs
def merge_sentences_by_threshold(
    sentences: tp.List[str],
    probs: tp.List[float],
    max_length: int,
    min_threshold: float = 0.1,
    tokenizer=None,
    use_tokens=False
) -> tp.Tuple[tp.List[str], tp.List[float]]:
    """
    根据概率阈值合并句子（向前合并低概率片段）
    
    规则：
    对于每个句子x，向前查找所有概率 < min_threshold 的句子(x-1, x-2, ...)，
    如果合并后不超过max_length，则将它们合并到当前句子
    
    Args:
        sentences: 句子列表
        probs: 每个句子的分割概率
        max_length: 最大长度限制
        min_threshold: 低概率阈值（默认0.1），低于此值认为是被迫分割
        tokenizer: tokenizer对象（token模式需要）
        use_tokens: 是否使用token计数
        
    Returns:
        merged_sentences: 合并后的句子列表
        merged_probs: 合并后的概率列表
    """
    if len(sentences) <= 1:
        return sentences, probs
    
    def get_length(s: str) -> int:
        if not s:
            return 0
        if use_tokens:
            return len(tokenizer.encode(s, add_special_tokens=False))
        return len(s)
    
    n = len(sentences)
    merged_into = [-1] * n  # merged_into[i] = j 表示句子i被合并到句子j中，-1表示未被合并
    
    # 从前往后遍历每个句子
    for i in range(n):
        # 如果当前句子已经被合并到前面的句子，跳过
        if merged_into[i] != -1:
            continue
        
        # 向前查找可以合并的低概率句子
        to_merge = [i]  # 包含当前句子
        j = i - 1
        
        while j >= 0:
            # 如果j已经被合并，跳过
            if merged_into[j] != -1:
                j -= 1
                continue
            
            # 如果j的概率很低
            if probs[j] < min_threshold and probs[j] >= 0:
                # 尝试合并
                test_sentences = [sentences[k] for k in range(j, i+1) if merged_into[k] == -1]
                test_merged = ''.join(test_sentences)
                
                if get_length(test_merged) <= max_length:
                    # 可以合并，标记j被合并到i
                    to_merge.insert(0, j)
                    merged_into[j] = i
                    j -= 1
                else:
                    # 超长，停止
                    break
            else:
                # 遇到高概率句子，停止
                break
    
    # 构建最终结果
    merged_sentences = []
    merged_probs = []
    
    for i in range(n):
        # 只处理未被合并的句子
        if merged_into[i] == -1:
            # 收集所有被合并到i的句子
            parts = [sentences[i]]
            for j in range(i):
                if merged_into[j] == i:
                    parts.insert(0, sentences[j])
            
            merged_sentences.append(''.join(parts))
            merged_probs.append(probs[i])
    
    return merged_sentences, merged_probs
@dataclass
class SentenceSplitterConfig:
    model_name: str = "sat-3l-sm"
    
    # 策略选择: "char_level" 或 "token_level"
    max_strategy: str = "char_level"
    
    # 字符级别参数
    max_sentence_len: int = 256
    
    # Token级别参数
    max_token_len: tp.Optional[int] = None
    tokenizer: tp.Optional[tp.Any] = None
    
    # 合并阈值参数
    enable_merge: bool = True  # 是否启用合并后处理
    merge_threshold: float = 0.1  # 低概率阈值
    
    min_text_length: int = 10
    min_unique_chars: int = 0
    
    device: str = "cuda"
    batch_size: int = 256
    block_size: int = 256
    stride: int = 256
    outer_batch_size: int = 1024
    verbose: bool = False
    pad_last_batch: bool = False

class SentenceSplitter:
    def __init__(self, config: SentenceSplitterConfig):
        self.config = config
        
        # 验证配置
        if config.max_strategy not in ["char_level", "token_level"]:
            raise ValueError(f"max_strategy must be 'char_level' or 'token_level', got {config.max_strategy}")
        
        if config.max_strategy == "token_level":
            if config.max_token_len is None:
                raise ValueError("max_token_len must be provided when max_strategy is 'token_level'")
            if config.tokenizer is None:
                raise ValueError("tokenizer must be provided when max_strategy is 'token_level'")
        
        # 加载分句模型
        device = torch.device(config.device if torch.cuda.is_available() else "cpu")
        try:
            self.model = SaT(
                self.config.model_name,
                from_pretrained_kwargs={"local_files_only": True},
            )
        except Exception:
            self.model = SaT(self.config.model_name)
        
        if "cuda" in config.device:
            self.model.half()
        self.model.eval().to(device)
        
        self.tokenizer = config.tokenizer
        
        if config.verbose:
            print(f"SentenceSplitter initialized with strategy: {config.max_strategy}")
            if config.max_strategy == "token_level":
                print(f"Max tokens per sentence: {config.max_token_len}")
            else:
                print(f"Max chars per sentence: {config.max_sentence_len}")
            if config.enable_merge:
                print(f"Merge enabled: merge_threshold={config.merge_threshold}")
    
    def _get_length(self, text: str) -> int:
        """根据策略获取文本长度"""
        if self.config.max_strategy == "char_level":
            return len(text)
        else:  # token_level
            return len(self.tokenizer.encode(text, add_special_tokens=False))
    
    def _get_max_length(self) -> int:
        """根据策略获取最大长度"""
        if self.config.max_strategy == "char_level":
            return self.config.max_sentence_len
        else:  # token_level
            return self.config.max_token_len
    
    @torch.inference_mode()
    def _split_single_text(self, text: str, return_probs: bool = False) -> tp.Union[tp.List[str], tp.Tuple[tp.List[str], tp.List[float]]]:
        """分割单个文本为句子列表
        
        Args:
            text: 输入文本
            return_probs: 是否返回分割概率
            
        Returns:
            如果 return_probs=False: 返回句子列表
            如果 return_probs=True: 返回 (句子列表, 概率列表)
        """
        if len(text) <= self.config.min_text_length:
            if return_probs:
                return [text], [-1.0]
            return [text]
            
        probs_generator = self.model.predict_proba(
            [text],
            stride=self.config.stride,
            block_size=self.config.block_size,
            batch_size=self.config.batch_size,
            pad_last_batch=self.config.pad_last_batch,
            outer_batch_size=self.config.outer_batch_size,
            verbose=False,
        )
        probs = list(probs_generator)[0]
        
        # 优先队列分割
        sentences, split_probs = adaptive_split_by_priority(
            text=text,
            probs=probs,
            max_length=self._get_max_length(),
            tokenizer=self.tokenizer,
            use_tokens=(self.config.max_strategy == "token_level")
        )
        
        # 过滤和质量控制
        if self.config.min_unique_chars > 0:
            filtered_sentences = []
            filtered_probs = []
            for s, p in zip(sentences, split_probs):
                if s and len(set(s)) > self.config.min_unique_chars:
                    filtered_sentences.append(s)
                    filtered_probs.append(p)
            sentences = filtered_sentences
            split_probs = filtered_probs
        else:
            sentences = [s for s in sentences if s]
        
        # 后处理：根据概率阈值合并句子
        if self.config.enable_merge and len(sentences) > 1:
            sentences, split_probs = merge_sentences_by_threshold(
                sentences=sentences,
                probs=split_probs,
                max_length=self._get_max_length(),
                min_threshold=self.config.merge_threshold,
                tokenizer=self.tokenizer,
                use_tokens=(self.config.max_strategy == "token_level")
            )
        
        if return_probs:
            return sentences, split_probs
        return sentences
    
    @torch.inference_mode()
    def split_texts(self, texts: tp.List[str]) -> tp.List[tp.List[str]]:
        """分割文本列表"""
        return [self._split_single_text(text, return_probs=False) for text in texts]
    
    @torch.inference_mode()
    def split_texts_with_probs(self, texts: tp.List[str]) -> tp.List[tp.Tuple[tp.List[str], tp.List[float]]]:
        """分割文本列表，同时返回每个分割点的概率
        
        Returns:
            List[Tuple[sentences, probs]]，其中：
            - sentences: 句子列表
            - probs: 每个句子对应的分割概率（-1.0 表示最后一个句子或短文本）
        """
        return [self._split_single_text(text, return_probs=True) for text in texts]
    
    def __call__(self, texts: tp.List[str]) -> tp.List[tp.List[str]]:
        """方便的调用接口"""
        return self.split_texts(texts)
    
    def clear_memory(self) -> None:
        """清理内存"""
        if self.model is not None:
            try:
                self.model.cpu()
                del self.model
                self.model = None
            except:
                pass
        gc.collect()
        torch.cuda.empty_cache()

if __name__ == "__main__":

    texts = ["""Wood Anemone - Dainty Spring Bloomers for the Woodland Garden
It's time to read and vote for your favorite article in the 2013 Write-Off Contest! The four finalist's articles are featured in the May 13 newsletter and can be found through this link. Hurry! Voting ends May 18.
If your garden is has dappled shade and you are looking for a lovely spring woodlander to combine with spring bulbs, Trillium and Hepatica, then try growing wood anemone, Anemone nemorosa. Available in white, pink or blue shades, this charming spring flower is sure to delight you!
(Editor's Note: This article was originally published on June 5, 2010. Your comments are welcome, but please be aware that authors of previously published articles may not be able to promptly respond to new questions or comments.)
One of the harbingers of the European spring is drifts of wood anemone growing under the deciduous forests of beech, oak and maple.Botanically, wood anemones are called Anemone nemorosa. Plants produce wiry stems to 10 to 25 cm.Each stem produces a whorl of three, trisected leaves and is topped with a single 2 to 3 cm diameter flower.Each bloom normally has 6 to 8 tepals (the 'petals' are actually modified sepals).In the wild, white is the normal colour but pink and blue forms do exist.Plants may be grown from seed but the seed needs to be sown as soon as it is ripe (they quickly lose viability if left dry on a shelf).They require a stratification period (essentially a winter) before they will germinate.
Due to the fussy nature of seed germination, plants are more commonly grown by division of their narrow rhizomes.If happy, wood anemone will multiply quite rapidly via underground rhizomes to produce a large-size colony.If dug after flowering, you can separate the plants into numerous plantlets. All you need is a growing stem and a couple of inches of the rhizome.
In the garden, wood anemones prefer dappled shade.Their soil should be moderately moist and organic-rich.They make admirable groundcovers under deciduous trees but in warm climates, may go dormant by mid summer.In cool climates, they will stay green well into September.
Wood anemones have been grown as garden ornamentals for hundreds of years.As a result of their natural variation, many named varieties now exist, most which were selected many years ago.While the wild form has small 2 to 3 cm diameter flowers, some selected forms have flowers approaching 6 cm in diameter.
Availability of this woodland anemone is variable. import os
import gc
import json
import torch
import torch.distributed as dist
from pathlib import Path
from typing import List, Dict, Any
from tqdm import tqdm
from transformers import AutoTokenizer
import argparse

# 导入你的SentenceSplitter相关代码
from dataclasses import dataclass
import typing as tp
import numpy as np
from wtpsplit import SaT

# ===== 复制你的SentenceSplitter代码 =====
def adaptive_split_by_priority(
    text: str,
    probs: np.ndarray,
    max_length: int,
    tokenizer=None,
    use_tokens=False
) -> tp.Tuple[tp.List[str], tp.List[float]]:
    """完全自适应的分割算法"""
    
    def get_length(s: str) -> int:
        if not s:
            return 0
        if use_tokens:
            return len(tokenizer.encode(s, add_special_tokens=False))
        return len(s)
    
    candidates = sorted(enumerate(probs), key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True)
    segments = [(0, len(text))]
    split_points = {}
    
    for split_idx, prob in candidates:
        for i, (start, end) in enumerate(segments):
            if start <= split_idx < end - 1:
                if get_length(text[start:end]) > max_length:
                    segments[i:i+1] = [
                        (start, split_idx + 1),
                        (split_idx + 1, end)
                    ]
                    split_points[split_idx] = prob
                    break
        
        if all(get_length(text[s:e]) <= max_length for s, e in segments):
            break
    
    sentences = []
    split_probs = []
    
    for start, end in segments:
        if start < end:
            sentences.append(text[start:end])
            if end - 1 in split_points:
                split_probs.append(float(split_points[end - 1]))
            else:
                split_probs.append(-1.0)
    
    return sentences, split_probs

def merge_sentences_by_threshold(
    sentences: tp.List[str],
    probs: tp.List[float],
    max_length: int,
    min_threshold: float = 0.1,
    tokenizer=None,
    use_tokens=False
) -> tp.Tuple[tp.List[str], tp.List[float]]:
    """根据概率阈值合并句子"""
    if len(sentences) <= 1:
        return sentences, probs
    
    def get_length(s: str) -> int:
        if not s:
            return 0
        if use_tokens:
            return len(tokenizer.encode(s, add_special_tokens=False))
        return len(s)
    
    n = len(sentences)
    merged_into = [-1] * n
    
    for i in range(n):
        if merged_into[i] != -1:
            continue
        
        to_merge = [i]
        j = i - 1
        
        while j >= 0:
            if merged_into[j] != -1:
                j -= 1
                continue
            
            if probs[j] < min_threshold and probs[j] >= 0:
                test_sentences = [sentences[k] for k in range(j, i+1) if merged_into[k] == -1]
                test_merged = ''.join(test_sentences)
                
                if get_length(test_merged) <= max_length:
                    to_merge.insert(0, j)
                    merged_into[j] = i
                    j -= 1
                else:
                    break
            else:
                break
    
    merged_sentences = []
    merged_probs = []
    
    for i in range(n):
        if merged_into[i] == -1:
            parts = [sentences[i]]
            for j in range(i):
                if merged_into[j] == i:
                    parts.insert(0, sentences[j])
            
            merged_sentences.append(''.join(parts))
            merged_probs.append(probs[i])
    
    return merged_sentences, merged_probs

@dataclass
class SentenceSplitterConfig:
    model_name: str = "sat-3l-sm"
    max_strategy: str = "char_level"
    max_sentence_len: int = 256
    max_token_len: tp.Optional[int] = None
    tokenizer: tp.Optional[tp.Any] = None
    enable_merge: bool = True
    merge_threshold: float = 0.1
    min_text_length: int = 10
    min_unique_chars: int = 0
    device: str = "cuda"
    batch_size: int = 256
    block_size: int = 256
    stride: int = 256
    outer_batch_size: int = 1024
    verbose: bool = False
    pad_last_batch: bool = False

class SentenceSplitter:
    def __init__(self, config: SentenceSplitterConfig):
        self.config = config
        
        if config.max_strategy not in ["char_level", "token_level"]:
            raise ValueError(f"max_strategy must be 'char_level' or 'token_level', got {config.max_strategy}")
        
        if config.max_strategy == "token_level":
            if config.max_token_len is None:
                raise ValueError("max_token_len must be provided when max_strategy is 'token_level'")
            if config.tokenizer is None:
                raise ValueError("tokenizer must be provided when max_strategy is 'token_level'")
        
        device = torch.device(config.device if torch.cuda.is_available() else "cpu")
        try:
            self.model = SaT(
                self.config.model_name,
                from_pretrained_kwargs={"local_files_only": True},
            )
        except Exception:
            self.model = SaT(self.config.model_name)
        
        if "cuda" in config.device:
            self.model.half()
        self.model.eval().to(device)
        
        self.tokenizer = config.tokenizer
        
        if config.verbose:
            print(f"SentenceSplitter initialized with strategy: {config.max_strategy}")
            if config.max_strategy == "token_level":
                print(f"Max tokens per sentence: {config.max_token_len}")
            else:
                print(f"Max chars per sentence: {config.max_sentence_len}")
            if config.enable_merge:
                print(f"Merge enabled: merge_threshold={config.merge_threshold}")
    
    def _get_length(self, text: str) -> int:
        if self.config.max_strategy == "char_level":
            return len(text)
        else:
            return len(self.tokenizer.encode(text, add_special_tokens=False))
    
    def _get_max_length(self) -> int:
        if self.config.max_strategy == "char_level":
            return self.config.max_sentence_len
        else:
            return self.config.max_token_len
    
    @torch.inference_mode()
    def _split_single_text(self, text: str, return_probs: bool = False) -> tp.Union[tp.List[str], tp.Tuple[tp.List[str], tp.List[float]]]:
        if len(text) <= self.config.min_text_length:
            if return_probs:
                return [text], [-1.0]
            return [text]
            
        probs_generator = self.model.predict_proba(
            [text],
            stride=self.config.stride,
            block_size=self.config.block_size,
            batch_size=self.config.batch_size,
            pad_last_batch=self.config.pad_last_batch,
            outer_batch_size=self.config.outer_batch_size,
            verbose=False,
        )
        probs = list(probs_generator)[0]
        
        sentences, split_probs = adaptive_split_by_priority(
            text=text,
            probs=probs,
            max_length=self._get_max_length(),
            tokenizer=self.tokenizer,
            use_tokens=(self.config.max_strategy == "token_level")
        )
        
        if self.config.min_unique_chars > 0:
            filtered_sentences = []
            filtered_probs = []
            for s, p in zip(sentences, split_probs):
                if s and len(set(s)) > self.config.min_unique_chars:
                    filtered_sentences.append(s)
                    filtered_probs.append(p)
            sentences = filtered_sentences
            split_probs = filtered_probs
        else:
            sentences = [s for s in sentences if s]
        
        if self.config.enable_merge and len(sentences) > 1:
            sentences, split_probs = merge_sentences_by_threshold(
                sentences=sentences,
                probs=split_probs,
                max_length=self._get_max_length(),
                min_threshold=self.config.merge_threshold,
                tokenizer=self.tokenizer,
                use_tokens=(self.config.max_strategy == "token_level")
            )
        
        if return_probs:
            return sentences, split_probs
        return sentences
    
    @torch.inference_mode()
    def split_texts(self, texts: tp.List[str]) -> tp.List[tp.List[str]]:
        return [self._split_single_text(text, return_probs=False) for text in texts]
    
    def __call__(self, texts: tp.List[str]) -> tp.List[tp.List[str]]:
        return self.split_texts(texts)
    
    def clear_memory(self) -> None:
        if self.model is not None:
            try:
                self.model.cpu()
                del self.model
                self.model = None
            except:
                pass
        gc.collect()
        torch.cuda.empty_cache()

# ===== 分布式处理主逻辑 =====

def setup_distributed():
    """初始化分布式环境"""
    if 'RANK' in os.environ and 'WORLD_SIZE' in os.environ:
        rank = int(os.environ['RANK'])
        world_size = int(os.environ['WORLD_SIZE'])
        local_rank = int(os.environ['LOCAL_RANK'])
    else:
        rank = 0
        world_size = 1
        local_rank = 0
    
    if world_size > 1:
        dist.init_process_group(backend='nccl')
    
    torch.cuda.set_device(local_rank)
    
    return rank, world_size, local_rank

def get_file_list(input_dir: str) -> List[str]:
    """获取所有需要处理的文件"""
    input_path = Path(input_dir)
    files = sorted(input_path.glob("sample-10BT-part-*.jsonl"))
    return [str(f) for f in files]

def distribute_files(files: List[str], rank: int, world_size: int) -> List[str]:
    """将文件分配给不同的进程"""
    return [f for i, f in enumerate(files) if i % world_size == rank]

def process_file(
    input_file: str,
    output_file: str,
    splitter: SentenceSplitter,
    rank: int
):
    """处理单个文件"""
    output_path = Path(output_file)
    output_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    
    # 如果输出文件已存在，跳过
    if output_path.exists():
        print(f"[Rank {rank}] Skipping {input_file} (already processed)")
        return
    
    print(f"[Rank {rank}] Processing {input_file}")
    
    processed_count = 0
    
    with open(input_file, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f_in, \
         open(output_file, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f_out:
        
        for line_num, line in enumerate(tqdm(f_in, desc=f"Rank {rank}", disable=(rank != 0))):
            try:
                data = json.loads(line.strip())
                
                # 提取text字段
                original_text = data.get('text', '')
                
                if original_text:
                    # 进行分句
                    sentences = splitter([original_text])[0]
                    # 替换text字段为list
                    data['text'] = sentences
                else:
                    data['text'] = []
                
                # 写入输出文件
                f_out.write(json.dumps(data, ensure_ascii=False) + '\n')
                processed_count += 1
                
                # 定期清理内存
                if processed_count % 1000 == 0:
                    gc.collect()
                    torch.cuda.empty_cache()
                    
            except Exception as e:
                print(f"[Rank {rank}] Error processing line {line_num} in {input_file}: {e}")
                continue
    
    print(f"[Rank {rank}] Completed {input_file} - Processed {processed_count} lines")

def main():
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser()
    parser.add_argument('--input_dir', type=str, 
                       default='/mnt/shared-storage-gpfs2/dllm-share-gpfs2/chengshuang/dataset/fineweb-edu/sample/finewebedu-sample-10BT-jsonl')
    parser.add_argument('--output_dir', type=str,
                       default='/mnt/shared-storage-gpfs2/dllm-share-gpfs2/chengshuang/dataset/fineweb-edu_split31/sample/finewebedu-sample-10BT-jsonl')
    parser.add_argument('--tokenizer_path', type=str,
                       default='/mnt/shared-storage-user/chengshuang/projects/modelZoo/Qwen_Qwen3-0.6B-Base')
    parser.add_argument('--model_name', type=str, default='sat-3l-sm')
    parser.add_argument('--max_token_len', type=int, default=25)
    parser.add_argument('--merge_threshold', type=float, default=0.05)
    parser.add_argument('--batch_size', type=int, default=256)
    
    args = parser.parse_args()
    
    # 初始化分布式环境
    rank, world_size, local_rank = setup_distributed()
    
    if rank == 0:
        print(f"Starting distributed processing with {world_size} processes")
        print(f"Input dir: {args.input_dir}")
        print(f"Output dir: {args.output_dir}")
    
    # 获取文件列表
    all_files = get_file_list(args.input_dir)
    
    if rank == 0:
        print(f"Found {len(all_files)} files to process")
    
    # 分配文件到各个进程
    my_files = distribute_files(all_files, rank, world_size)
    
    print(f"[Rank {rank}] Assigned {len(my_files)} files: {[Path(f).name for f in my_files]}")
    
    # 加载tokenizer
    tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(args.tokenizer_path, trust_remote_code=True)
    
    # 配置分句器
    config = SentenceSplitterConfig(
        model_name=args.model_name,
        max_strategy="token_level",
        max_token_len=args.max_token_len,
        tokenizer=tokenizer,
        enable_merge=True,
        merge_threshold=args.merge_threshold,
        device=f"cuda:{local_rank}",
        batch_size=args.batch_size,
        verbose=(rank == 0),
    )
    
    # 初始化分句器
    splitter = SentenceSplitter(config)
    
    # 处理分配的文件
    for input_file in my_files:
        output_file = os.path.join(
            args.output_dir,
            Path(input_file).name
        )
        
        try:
            process_file(input_file, output_file, splitter, rank)
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"[Rank {rank}] Failed to process {input_file}: {e}")
            continue
    
    # 清理资源
    splitter.clear_memory()
    
    if world_size > 1:
        dist.barrier()
    
    if rank == 0:
        print("All processing completed!")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

## 1. 改进的主处理脚本 `process_fineweb_ddp.py`

```python
import os
import gc
import json
import torch
import torch.distributed as dist
from torch.utils.data import Dataset, DataLoader
from torch.utils.data.distributed import DistributedSampler
from pathlib import Path
from typing import List, Dict, Any, Optional
from tqdm import tqdm
from transformers import AutoTokenizer
import argparse

# 导入你的 SentenceSplitter 相关代码
from dataclasses import dataclass
import typing as tp
import numpy as np
from wtpsplit import SaT

# ===== SentenceSplitter 代码（保持不变）=====
def adaptive_split_by_priority(
    text: str,
    probs: np.ndarray,
    max_length: int,
    tokenizer=None,
    use_tokens=False
) -> tp.Tuple[tp.List[str], tp.List[float]]:
    """完全自适应的分割算法"""
    
    def get_length(s: str) -> int:
        if not s:
            return 0
        if use_tokens:
            return len(tokenizer.encode(s, add_special_tokens=False))
        return len(s)
    
    candidates = sorted(enumerate(probs), key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True)
    segments = [(0, len(text))]
    split_points = {}
    
    for split_idx, prob in candidates:
        for i, (start, end) in enumerate(segments):
            if start <= split_idx < end - 1:
                if get_length(text[start:end]) > max_length:
                    segments[i:i+1] = [
                        (start, split_idx + 1),
                        (split_idx + 1, end)
                    ]
                    split_points[split_idx] = prob
                    break
        
        if all(get_length(text[s:e]) <= max_length for s, e in segments):
            break
    
    sentences = []
    split_probs = []
    
    for start, end in segments:
        if start < end:
            sentences.append(text[start:end])
            if end - 1 in split_points:
                split_probs.append(float(split_points[end - 1]))
            else:
                split_probs.append(-1.0)
    
    return sentences, split_probs

def merge_sentences_by_threshold(
    sentences: tp.List[str],
    probs: tp.List[float],
    max_length: int,
    min_threshold: float = 0.1,
    tokenizer=None,
    use_tokens=False
) -> tp.Tuple[tp.List[str], tp.List[float]]:
    """根据概率阈值合并句子"""
    if len(sentences) <= 1:
        return sentences, probs
    
    def get_length(s: str) -> int:
        if not s:
            return 0
        if use_tokens:
            return len(tokenizer.encode(s, add_special_tokens=False))
        return len(s)
    
    n = len(sentences)
    merged_into = [-1] * n
    
    for i in range(n):
        if merged_into[i] != -1:
            continue
        
        to_merge = [i]
        j = i - 1
        
        while j >= 0:
            if merged_into[j] != -1:
                j -= 1
                continue
            
            if probs[j] < min_threshold and probs[j] >= 0:
                test_sentences = [sentences[k] for k in range(j, i+1) if merged_into[k] == -1]
                test_merged = ''.join(test_sentences)
                
                if get_length(test_merged) <= max_length:
                    to_merge.insert(0, j)
                    merged_into[j] = i
                    j -= 1
                else:
                    break
            else:
                break
    
    merged_sentences = []
    merged_probs = []
    
    for i in range(n):
        if merged_into[i] == -1:
            parts = [sentences[i]]
            for j in range(i):
                if merged_into[j] == i:
                    parts.insert(0, sentences[j])
            
            merged_sentences.append(''.join(parts))
            merged_probs.append(probs[i])
    
    return merged_sentences, merged_probs

@dataclass
class SentenceSplitterConfig:
    model_name: str = "sat-3l-sm"
    max_strategy: str = "char_level"
    max_sentence_len: int = 256
    max_token_len: tp.Optional[int] = None
    tokenizer: tp.Optional[tp.Any] = None
    enable_merge: bool = True
    merge_threshold: float = 0.1
    min_text_length: int = 10
    min_unique_chars: int = 0
    device: str = "cuda"
    batch_size: int = 256
    block_size: int = 256
    stride: int = 256
    outer_batch_size: int = 1024
    verbose: bool = False
    pad_last_batch: bool = False

class SentenceSplitter:
    def __init__(self, config: SentenceSplitterConfig):
        self.config = config
        
        if config.max_strategy not in ["char_level", "token_level"]:
            raise ValueError(f"max_strategy must be 'char_level' or 'token_level', got {config.max_strategy}")
        
        if config.max_strategy == "token_level":
            if config.max_token_len is None:
                raise ValueError("max_token_len must be provided when max_strategy is 'token_level'")
            if config.tokenizer is None:
                raise ValueError("tokenizer must be provided when max_strategy is 'token_level'")
        
        device = torch.device(config.device if torch.cuda.is_available() else "cpu")
        try:
            self.model = SaT(
                self.config.model_name,
                from_pretrained_kwargs={"local_files_only": True},
            )
        except Exception:
            self.model = SaT(self.config.model_name)
        
        if "cuda" in config.device:
            self.model.half()
        self.model.eval().to(device)
        
        self.tokenizer = config.tokenizer
        
        if config.verbose:
            print(f"SentenceSplitter initialized with strategy: {config.max_strategy}")
            if config.max_strategy == "token_level":
                print(f"Max tokens per sentence: {config.max_token_len}")
            else:
                print(f"Max chars per sentence: {config.max_sentence_len}")
            if config.enable_merge:
                print(f"Merge enabled: merge_threshold={config.merge_threshold}")
    
    def _get_length(self, text: str) -> int:
        if self.config.max_strategy == "char_level":
            return len(text)
        else:
            return len(self.tokenizer.encode(text, add_special_tokens=False))
    
    def _get_max_length(self) -> int:
        if self.config.max_strategy == "char_level":
            return self.config.max_sentence_len
        else:
            return self.config.max_token_len
    
    @torch.inference_mode()
    def _split_single_text(self, text: str, return_probs: bool = False) -> tp.Union[tp.List[str], tp.Tuple[tp.List[str], tp.List[float]]]:
        if len(text) <= self.config.min_text_length:
            if return_probs:
                return [text], [-1.0]
            return [text]
            
        probs_generator = self.model.predict_proba(
            [text],
            stride=self.config.stride,
            block_size=self.config.block_size,
            batch_size=self.config.batch_size,
            pad_last_batch=self.config.pad_last_batch,
            outer_batch_size=self.config.outer_batch_size,
            verbose=False,
        )
        probs = list(probs_generator)[0]
        
        sentences, split_probs = adaptive_split_by_priority(
            text=text,
            probs=probs,
            max_length=self._get_max_length(),
            tokenizer=self.tokenizer,
            use_tokens=(self.config.max_strategy == "token_level")
        )
        
        if self.config.min_unique_chars > 0:
            filtered_sentences = []
            filtered_probs = []
            for s, p in zip(sentences, split_probs):
                if s and len(set(s)) > self.config.min_unique_chars:
                    filtered_sentences.append(s)
                    filtered_probs.append(p)
            sentences = filtered_sentences
            split_probs = filtered_probs
        else:
            sentences = [s for s in sentences if s]
        
        if self.config.enable_merge and len(sentences) > 1:
            sentences, split_probs = merge_sentences_by_threshold(
                sentences=sentences,
                probs=split_probs,
                max_length=self._get_max_length(),
                min_threshold=self.config.merge_threshold,
                tokenizer=self.tokenizer,
                use_tokens=(self.config.max_strategy == "token_level")
            )
        
        if return_probs:
            return sentences, split_probs
        return sentences
    
    @torch.inference_mode()
    def split_batch(self, texts: List[str]) -> List[List[str]]:
        """批量处理文本"""
        return [self._split_single_text(text, return_probs=False) for text in texts]
    
    def clear_memory(self) -> None:
        if self.model is not None:
            try:
                self.model.cpu()
                del self.model
                self.model = None
            except:
                pass
        gc.collect()
        torch.cuda.empty_cache()

# ===== Dataset 定义 =====

class JSONLDataset(Dataset):
    """读取多个 JSONL 文件的 Dataset"""
    
    def __init__(self, file_paths: List[str], load_all_to_memory: bool = False):
        """
        Args:
            file_paths: JSONL 文件路径列表
            load_all_to_memory: 是否将所有数据加载到内存（适合小数据集）
        """
        self.file_paths = file_paths
        self.load_all_to_memory = load_all_to_memory
        
        # 构建索引：[(file_idx, line_idx), ...]
        self.index = []
        self.data = [] if load_all_to_memory else None
        
        for file_idx, file_path in enumerate(file_paths):
            with open(file_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                for line_idx, line in enumerate(f):
                    self.index.append((file_idx, line_idx))
                    if load_all_to_memory:
                        self.data.append(json.loads(line.strip()))
        
        print(f"Loaded index for {len(self.index)} samples from {len(file_paths)} files")
    
    def __len__(self):
        return len(self.index)
    
    def __getitem__(self, idx):
        if self.load_all_to_memory:
            return self.data[idx]
        
        # 按需读取（内存友好，但可能较慢）
        file_idx, line_idx = self.index[idx]
        file_path = self.file_paths[file_idx]
        
        with open(file_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            for i, line in enumerate(f):
                if i == line_idx:
                    return json.loads(line.strip())
        
        raise IndexError(f"Index {idx} not found")

def collate_fn(batch: List[Dict]) -> Dict:
    """DataLoader 的 collate 函数"""
    return {
        'data': batch,  # 保持原始数据结构
        'texts': [item.get('text', '') for item in batch],
    }

# ===== 分布式处理逻辑 =====

def setup_distributed():
    """初始化分布式环境"""
    if 'RANK' in os.environ and 'WORLD_SIZE' in os.environ:
        rank = int(os.environ['RANK'])
        world_size = int(os.environ['WORLD_SIZE'])
        local_rank = int(os.environ['LOCAL_RANK'])
        
        dist.init_process_group(backend='nccl')
        torch.cuda.set_device(local_rank)
    else:
        rank = 0
        world_size = 1
        local_rank = 0
    
    return rank, world_size, local_rank

def get_file_list(input_dir: str) -> List[str]:
    """获取所有需要处理的文件"""
    input_path = Path(input_dir)
    files = sorted(input_path.glob("sample-10BT-part-*.jsonl"))
    return [str(f) for f in files]

def process_with_dataloader(
    args,
    rank: int,
    world_size: int,
    local_rank: int
):
    """使用 DataLoader 进行分布式处理"""
    
    # 获取所有文件
    all_files = get_file_list(args.input_dir)
    
    if rank == 0:
        print(f"Found {len(all_files)} files")
        print(f"World size: {world_size}")
    
    # 创建 Dataset
    dataset = JSONLDataset(
        all_files,
        load_all_to_memory=args.load_to_memory
    )
    
    # 创建 DistributedSampler
    sampler = DistributedSampler(
        dataset,
        num_replicas=world_size,
        rank=rank,
        shuffle=False,  # 保持顺序
        drop_last=False
    )
    
    # 创建 DataLoader
    dataloader = DataLoader(
        dataset,
        batch_size=args.dataloader_batch_size,
        sampler=sampler,
        num_workers=args.num_workers,
        collate_fn=collate_fn,
        pin_memory=True,
    )
    
    if rank == 0:
        print(f"DataLoader created with batch_size={args.dataloader_batch_size}, num_workers={args.num_workers}")
        print(f"Total batches per rank: {len(dataloader)}")
    
    # 加载 tokenizer
    tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(args.tokenizer_path, trust_remote_code=True)
    
    # 配置分句器
    config = SentenceSplitterConfig(
        model_name=args.model_name,
        max_strategy="token_level",
        max_token_len=args.max_token_len,
        tokenizer=tokenizer,
        enable_merge=True,
        merge_threshold=args.merge_threshold,
        device=f"cuda:{local_rank}",
        batch_size=args.splitter_batch_size,
        verbose=(rank == 0),
    )
    
    # 初始化分句器
    splitter = SentenceSplitter(config)
    
    # 创建输出目录
    output_dir = Path(args.output_dir)
    output_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    
    # 每个 rank 写自己的临时文件
    temp_output_file = output_dir / f"temp_rank_{rank:04d}.jsonl"
    
    if rank == 0:
        print(f"Starting processing...")
    
    processed_count = 0
    
    with open(temp_output_file, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f_out:
        # 使用 tqdm（只在 rank 0 显示）
        iterator = tqdm(dataloader, desc=f"Rank {rank}", disable=(rank != 0))
        
        for batch_idx, batch in enumerate(iterator):
            try:
                texts = batch['texts']
                original_data = batch['data']
                
                # 批量分句
                split_results = splitter.split_batch(texts)
                
                # 写入结果
                for data, sentences in zip(original_data, split_results):
                    data['text'] = sentences
                    f_out.write(json.dumps(data, ensure_ascii=False) + '\n')
                    processed_count += 1
                
                # 定期清理内存
                if (batch_idx + 1) % 100 == 0:
                    gc.collect()
                    torch.cuda.empty_cache()
                    
            except Exception as e:
                print(f"[Rank {rank}] Error processing batch {batch_idx}: {e}")
                continue
    
    print(f"[Rank {rank}] Completed - Processed {processed_count} samples")
    
    # 清理资源
    splitter.clear_memory()
    
    # 同步所有进程
    if world_size > 1:
        dist.barrier()
    
    # Rank 0 合并所有临时文件
    if rank == 0:
        print("Merging temporary files...")
        merge_temp_files(output_dir, args.output_file, world_size)
        print("All processing completed!")

def merge_temp_files(output_dir: Path, final_output: str, world_size: int):
    """合并所有临时文件"""
    final_path = Path(final_output)
    final_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    
    with open(final_output, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f_out:
        for rank in range(world_size):
            temp_file = output_dir / f"temp_rank_{rank:04d}.jsonl"
            
            if temp_file.exists():
                print(f"Merging {temp_file.name}...")
                with open(temp_file, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f_in:
                    for line in f_in:
                        f_out.write(line)
                
                # 删除临时文件
                temp_file.unlink()
            else:
                print(f"Warning: {temp_file.name} not found")
    
    print(f"Merged output saved to {final_output}")

def main():
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser()
    
    # 输入输出路径
    parser.add_argument('--input_dir', type=str, required=True,
                       help='Input directory containing JSONL files')
    parser.add_argument('--output_dir', type=str, required=True,
                       help='Output directory for temporary files')
    parser.add_argument('--output_file', type=str, required=True,
                       help='Final merged output file')
    
    # 模型配置
    parser.add_argument('--tokenizer_path', type=str, required=True,
                       help='Path to tokenizer')
    parser.add_argument('--model_name', type=str, default='sat-3l-sm',
                       help='Sentence splitter model name')
    
    # 分句参数
    parser.add_argument('--max_token_len', type=int, default=25,
                       help='Maximum tokens per sentence')
    parser.add_argument('--merge_threshold', type=float, default=0.05,
                       help='Threshold for merging sentences')
    parser.add_argument('--splitter_batch_size', type=int, default=256,
                       help='Batch size for sentence splitter model')
    
    # DataLoader 参数
    parser.add_argument('--dataloader_batch_size', type=int, default=32,
                       help='Batch size for DataLoader')
    parser.add_argument('--num_workers', type=int, default=4,
                       help='Number of workers for DataLoader')
    parser.add_argument('--load_to_memory', action='store_true',
                       help='Load all data to memory (faster but uses more RAM)')
    
    args = parser.parse_args()
    
    # 初始化分布式环境
    rank, world_size, local_rank = setup_distributed()
    
    # 运行处理
    process_with_dataloader(args, rank, world_size, local_rank)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
```

## 使用 DataLoader + DDP 的优势

### 1. **更好的负载均衡**
```python
# DistributedSampler 自动确保每个 GPU 处理相同数量的样本
sampler = DistributedSampler(dataset, num_replicas=world_size, rank=rank)
```

### 2. **批量处理提高效率**
```python
# 可以批量处理多个文本，提高 GPU 利用率
dataloader_batch_size=32  # 一次处理32个样本
```

### 3. **多进程数据加载**
```python
# DataLoader 的 num_workers 可以并行读取数据
num_workers=4  # 4个进程并行读取
```

### 4. **内存友好**
```python
# 支持按需读取（不加载全部数据到内存）
load_to_memory=False  # 大数据集推荐
```

### 5. **自动数据分片**
- 不需要手动按文件分配
- DistributedSampler 自动按样本分配
- 更细粒度的负载均衡

## 性能对比

| 方案 | 负载均衡 | GPU利用率 | 内存效率 | 实现复杂度 |
|------|---------|-----------|----------|-----------|
| 按文件分配 | ⭐⭐ | ⭐⭐ | ⭐⭐⭐ | ⭐ |
| DataLoader+DDP | ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ | ⭐⭐⭐⭐ | ⭐⭐⭐⭐ | ⭐⭐⭐ |

```python
import os
import gc
import json
import torch
import torch.distributed as dist
from torch.utils.data import Dataset, DataLoader
from torch.utils.data.distributed import DistributedSampler
from pathlib import Path
from typing import List, Dict, Any, Optional
from tqdm import tqdm
from transformers import AutoTokenizer
import argparse

# 导入你的 SentenceSplitter 相关代码
from dataclasses import dataclass
import typing as tp
import numpy as np
from wtpsplit import SaT

# ===== SentenceSplitter 代码（保持不变）=====
def adaptive_split_by_priority(
    text: str,
    probs: np.ndarray,
    max_length: int,
    tokenizer=None,
    use_tokens=False
) -> tp.Tuple[tp.List[str], tp.List[float]]:
    """完全自适应的分割算法"""
    
    def get_length(s: str) -> int:
        if not s:
            return 0
        if use_tokens:
            return len(tokenizer.encode(s, add_special_tokens=False))
        return len(s)
    
    candidates = sorted(enumerate(probs), key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True)
    segments = [(0, len(text))]
    split_points = {}
    
    for split_idx, prob in candidates:
        for i, (start, end) in enumerate(segments):
            if start <= split_idx < end - 1:
                if get_length(text[start:end]) > max_length:
                    segments[i:i+1] = [
                        (start, split_idx + 1),
                        (split_idx + 1, end)
                    ]
                    split_points[split_idx] = prob
                    break
        
        if all(get_length(text[s:e]) <= max_length for s, e in segments):
            break
    
    sentences = []
    split_probs = []
    
    for start, end in segments:
        if start < end:
            sentences.append(text[start:end])
            if end - 1 in split_points:
                split_probs.append(float(split_points[end - 1]))
            else:
                split_probs.append(-1.0)
    
    return sentences, split_probs

def merge_sentences_by_threshold(
    sentences: tp.List[str],
    probs: tp.List[float],
    max_length: int,
    min_threshold: float = 0.1,
    tokenizer=None,
    use_tokens=False
) -> tp.Tuple[tp.List[str], tp.List[float]]:
    """根据概率阈值合并句子"""
    if len(sentences) <= 1:
        return sentences, probs
    
    def get_length(s: str) -> int:
        if not s:
            return 0
        if use_tokens:
            return len(tokenizer.encode(s, add_special_tokens=False))
        return len(s)
    
    n = len(sentences)
    merged_into = [-1] * n
    
    for i in range(n):
        if merged_into[i] != -1:
            continue
        
        to_merge = [i]
        j = i - 1
        
        while j >= 0:
            if merged_into[j] != -1:
                j -= 1
                continue
            
            if probs[j] < min_threshold and probs[j] >= 0:
                test_sentences = [sentences[k] for k in range(j, i+1) if merged_into[k] == -1]
                test_merged = ''.join(test_sentences)
                
                if get_length(test_merged) <= max_length:
                    to_merge.insert(0, j)
                    merged_into[j] = i
                    j -= 1
                else:
                    break
            else:
                break
    
    merged_sentences = []
    merged_probs = []
    
    for i in range(n):
        if merged_into[i] == -1:
            parts = [sentences[i]]
            for j in range(i):
                if merged_into[j] == i:
                    parts.insert(0, sentences[j])
            
            merged_sentences.append(''.join(parts))
            merged_probs.append(probs[i])
    
    return merged_sentences, merged_probs

@dataclass
class SentenceSplitterConfig:
    model_name: str = "sat-3l-sm"
    max_strategy: str = "char_level"
    max_sentence_len: int = 256
    max_token_len: tp.Optional[int] = None
    tokenizer: tp.Optional[tp.Any] = None
    enable_merge: bool = True
    merge_threshold: float = 0.1
    min_text_length: int = 10
    min_unique_chars: int = 0
    device: str = "cuda"
    batch_size: int = 256
    block_size: int = 256
    stride: int = 256
    outer_batch_size: int = 1024
    verbose: bool = False
    pad_last_batch: bool = False

class SentenceSplitter:
    def __init__(self, config: SentenceSplitterConfig):
        self.config = config
        
        if config.max_strategy not in ["char_level", "token_level"]:
            raise ValueError(f"max_strategy must be 'char_level' or 'token_level', got {config.max_strategy}")
        
        if config.max_strategy == "token_level":
            if config.max_token_len is None:
                raise ValueError("max_token_len must be provided when max_strategy is 'token_level'")
            if config.tokenizer is None:
                raise ValueError("tokenizer must be provided when max_strategy is 'token_level'")
        
        device = torch.device(config.device if torch.cuda.is_available() else "cpu")
        try:
            self.model = SaT(
                self.config.model_name,
                from_pretrained_kwargs={"local_files_only": True},
            )
        except Exception:
            self.model = SaT(self.config.model_name)
        
        if "cuda" in config.device:
            self.model.half()
        self.model.eval().to(device)
        
        self.tokenizer = config.tokenizer
        
        if config.verbose:
            print(f"SentenceSplitter initialized with strategy: {config.max_strategy}")
            if config.max_strategy == "token_level":
                print(f"Max tokens per sentence: {config.max_token_len}")
            else:
                print(f"Max chars per sentence: {config.max_sentence_len}")
            if config.enable_merge:
                print(f"Merge enabled: merge_threshold={config.merge_threshold}")
    
    def _get_length(self, text: str) -> int:
        if self.config.max_strategy == "char_level":
            return len(text)
        else:
            return len(self.tokenizer.encode(text, add_special_tokens=False))
    
    def _get_max_length(self) -> int:
        if self.config.max_strategy == "char_level":
            return self.config.max_sentence_len
        else:
            return self.config.max_token_len
    
    @torch.inference_mode()
    def _split_single_text(self, text: str, return_probs: bool = False) -> tp.Union[tp.List[str], tp.Tuple[tp.List[str], tp.List[float]]]:
        if len(text) <= self.config.min_text_length:
            if return_probs:
                return [text], [-1.0]
            return [text]
            
        probs_generator = self.model.predict_proba(
            [text],
            stride=self.config.stride,
            block_size=self.config.block_size,
            batch_size=self.config.batch_size,
            pad_last_batch=self.config.pad_last_batch,
            outer_batch_size=self.config.outer_batch_size,
            verbose=False,
        )
        probs = list(probs_generator)[0]
        
        sentences, split_probs = adaptive_split_by_priority(
            text=text,
            probs=probs,
            max_length=self._get_max_length(),
            tokenizer=self.tokenizer,
            use_tokens=(self.config.max_strategy == "token_level")
        )
        
        if self.config.min_unique_chars > 0:
            filtered_sentences = []
            filtered_probs = []
            for s, p in zip(sentences, split_probs):
                if s and len(set(s)) > self.config.min_unique_chars:
                    filtered_sentences.append(s)
                    filtered_probs.append(p)
            sentences = filtered_sentences
            split_probs = filtered_probs
        else:
            sentences = [s for s in sentences if s]
        
        if self.config.enable_merge and len(sentences) > 1:
            sentences, split_probs = merge_sentences_by_threshold(
                sentences=sentences,
                probs=split_probs,
                max_length=self._get_max_length(),
                min_threshold=self.config.merge_threshold,
                tokenizer=self.tokenizer,
                use_tokens=(self.config.max_strategy == "token_level")
            )
        
        if return_probs:
            return sentences, split_probs
        return sentences
    
    @torch.inference_mode()
    def split_batch(self, texts: List[str]) -> List[List[str]]:
        """批量处理文本"""
        return [self._split_single_text(text, return_probs=False) for text in texts]
    
    def clear_memory(self) -> None:
        if self.model is not None:
            try:
                self.model.cpu()
                del self.model
                self.model = None
            except:
                pass
        gc.collect()
        torch.cuda.empty_cache()

# ===== Dataset 定义 =====

class JSONLDataset(Dataset):
    """读取多个 JSONL 文件的 Dataset"""
    
    def __init__(self, file_paths: List[str], load_all_to_memory: bool = False):
        """
        Args:
            file_paths: JSONL 文件路径列表
            load_all_to_memory: 是否将所有数据加载到内存（适合小数据集）
        """
        self.file_paths = file_paths
        self.load_all_to_memory = load_all_to_memory
        
        # 构建索引：[(file_idx, line_idx), ...]
        self.index = []
        self.data = [] if load_all_to_memory else None
        
        for file_idx, file_path in enumerate(file_paths):
            with open(file_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                for line_idx, line in enumerate(f):
                    self.index.append((file_idx, line_idx))
                    if load_all_to_memory:
                        self.data.append(json.loads(line.strip()))
        
        print(f"Loaded index for {len(self.index)} samples from {len(file_paths)} files")
    
    def __len__(self):
        return len(self.index)
    
    def __getitem__(self, idx):
        if self.load_all_to_memory:
            return self.data[idx]
        
        # 按需读取（内存友好，但可能较慢）
        file_idx, line_idx = self.index[idx]
        file_path = self.file_paths[file_idx]
        
        with open(file_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            for i, line in enumerate(f):
                if i == line_idx:
                    return json.loads(line.strip())
        
        raise IndexError(f"Index {idx} not found")

def collate_fn(batch: List[Dict]) -> Dict:
    """DataLoader 的 collate 函数"""
    return {
        'data': batch,  # 保持原始数据结构
        'texts': [item.get('text', '') for item in batch],
    }

# ===== 分片写入管理器 =====

class ShardedWriter:
    """按文件大小自动分片的写入器"""
    
    def __init__(
        self,
        output_dir: Path,
        rank: int,
        max_shard_size_gb: float = 2.0,
        prefix: str = "part"
    ):
        self.output_dir = output_dir
        self.rank = rank
        self.max_shard_size_bytes = int(max_shard_size_gb * 1024 * 1024 * 1024)
        self.prefix = prefix
        
        self.current_shard_idx = 0
        self.current_file = None
        self.current_size = 0
        self.shard_files = []
        
        # 创建第一个分片
        self._create_new_shard()
    
    def _create_new_shard(self):
        """创建新的分片文件"""
        if self.current_file is not None:
            self.current_file.close()
        
        # 文件名格式: part-rank{rank:04d}-shard{shard:04d}.jsonl
        filename = f"{self.prefix}-rank{self.rank:04d}-shard{self.current_shard_idx:04d}.jsonl"
        filepath = self.output_dir / filename
        
        self.current_file = open(filepath, 'w', encoding='utf-8')
        self.current_size = 0
        self.shard_files.append(filepath)
        
        print(f"[Rank {self.rank}] Created new shard: {filename}")
    
    def write(self, data: Dict):
        """写入一条数据"""
        line = json.dumps(data, ensure_ascii=False) + '\n'
        line_bytes = line.encode('utf-8')
        line_size = len(line_bytes)
        
        # 检查是否需要创建新分片
        if self.current_size + line_size > self.max_shard_size_bytes:
            self.current_shard_idx += 1
            self._create_new_shard()
        
        # 写入数据
        self.current_file.write(line)
        self.current_size += line_size
    
    def close(self):
        """关闭当前文件"""
        if self.current_file is not None:
            self.current_file.close()
            self.current_file = None
    
    def get_shard_files(self) -> List[Path]:
        """获取所有分片文件"""
        return self.shard_files

# ===== 分布式处理逻辑 =====

def setup_distributed():
    """初始化分布式环境"""
    if 'RANK' in os.environ and 'WORLD_SIZE' in os.environ:
        rank = int(os.environ['RANK'])
        world_size = int(os.environ['WORLD_SIZE'])
        local_rank = int(os.environ['LOCAL_RANK'])
        
        dist.init_process_group(backend='nccl')
        torch.cuda.set_device(local_rank)
    else:
        rank = 0
        world_size = 1
        local_rank = 0
    
    return rank, world_size, local_rank

def get_file_list(input_dir: str) -> List[str]:
    """获取所有需要处理的文件"""
    input_path = Path(input_dir)
    files = sorted(input_path.glob("sample-10BT-part-*.jsonl"))
    return [str(f) for f in files]

def process_with_dataloader(
    args,
    rank: int,
    world_size: int,
    local_rank: int
):
    """使用 DataLoader 进行分布式处理"""
    
    # 获取所有文件
    all_files = get_file_list(args.input_dir)
    
    if rank == 0:
        print(f"Found {len(all_files)} files")
        print(f"World size: {world_size}")
    
    # 创建 Dataset
    dataset = JSONLDataset(
        all_files,
        load_all_to_memory=args.load_to_memory
    )
    
    # 创建 DistributedSampler
    sampler = DistributedSampler(
        dataset,
        num_replicas=world_size,
        rank=rank,
        shuffle=False,  # 保持顺序
        drop_last=False
    )
    
    # 创建 DataLoader
    dataloader = DataLoader(
        dataset,
        batch_size=args.dataloader_batch_size,
        sampler=sampler,
        num_workers=args.num_workers,
        collate_fn=collate_fn,
        pin_memory=True,
    )
    
    if rank == 0:
        print(f"DataLoader created with batch_size={args.dataloader_batch_size}, num_workers={args.num_workers}")
        print(f"Total batches per rank: {len(dataloader)}")
    
    # 加载 tokenizer
    tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(args.tokenizer_path, trust_remote_code=True)
    
    # 配置分句器
    config = SentenceSplitterConfig(
        model_name=args.model_name,
        max_strategy="token_level",
        max_token_len=args.max_token_len,
        tokenizer=tokenizer,
        enable_merge=True,
        merge_threshold=args.merge_threshold,
        device=f"cuda:{local_rank}",
        batch_size=args.splitter_batch_size,
        verbose=(rank == 0),
    )
    
    # 初始化分句器
    splitter = SentenceSplitter(config)
    
    # 创建输出目录
    output_dir = Path(args.output_dir)
    output_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    
    # 创建分片写入器
    writer = ShardedWriter(
        output_dir=output_dir,
        rank=rank,
        max_shard_size_gb=args.max_shard_size_gb,
        prefix="part"
    )
    
    if rank == 0:
        print(f"Starting processing with max shard size: {args.max_shard_size_gb}GB")
    
    processed_count = 0
    
    # 使用 tqdm（只在 rank 0 显示）
    iterator = tqdm(dataloader, desc=f"Rank {rank}", disable=(rank != 0))
    
    for batch_idx, batch in enumerate(iterator):
        try:
            texts = batch['texts']
            original_data = batch['data']
            
            # 批量分句
            split_results = splitter.split_batch(texts)
            
            # 写入结果（自动分片）
            for data, sentences in zip(original_data, split_results):
                data['text'] = sentences
                writer.write(data)
                processed_count += 1
            
            # 定期清理内存
            if (batch_idx + 1) % 100 == 0:
                gc.collect()
                torch.cuda.empty_cache()
                
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"[Rank {rank}] Error processing batch {batch_idx}: {e}")
            continue
    
    # 关闭写入器
    writer.close()
    
    shard_files = writer.get_shard_files()
    print(f"[Rank {rank}] Completed - Processed {processed_count} samples into {len(shard_files)} shards")
    
    # 清理资源
    splitter.clear_memory()
    
    # 同步所有进程
    if world_size > 1:
        dist.barrier()
    
    # Rank 0 重命名所有分片文件
    if rank == 0:
        print("Renaming and organizing shard files...")
        organize_shards(output_dir, world_size)
        print("All processing completed!")

def organize_shards(output_dir: Path, world_size: int):
    """收集并重命名所有分片文件"""
    
    # 收集所有分片文件
    all_shards = sorted(output_dir.glob("part-rank*-shard*.jsonl"))
    
    print(f"Found {len(all_shards)} shard files from {world_size} ranks")
    
    # 重命名为统一格式: sample-10BT-part-XXX.jsonl
    for idx, shard_file in enumerate(all_shards):
        new_name = f"sample-10BT-part-{idx:03d}.jsonl"
        new_path = output_dir / new_name
        
        # 重命名
        shard_file.rename(new_path)
        
        # 打印文件大小
        file_size_gb = new_path.stat().st_size / (1024**3)
        print(f"  {new_name}: {file_size_gb:.2f} GB")
    
    print(f"All files renamed successfully!")

def main():
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser()
    
    # 输入输出路径
    parser.add_argument('--input_dir', type=str, required=True,
                       help='Input directory containing JSONL files')
    parser.add_argument('--output_dir', type=str, required=True,
                       help='Output directory for shard files')
    
    # 模型配置
    parser.add_argument('--tokenizer_path', type=str, required=True,
                       help='Path to tokenizer')
    parser.add_argument('--model_name', type=str, default='sat-3l-sm',
                       help='Sentence splitter model name')
    
    # 分句参数
    parser.add_argument('--max_token_len', type=int, default=25,
                       help='Maximum tokens per sentence')
    parser.add_argument('--merge_threshold', type=float, default=0.05,
                       help='Threshold for merging sentences')
    parser.add_argument('--splitter_batch_size', type=int, default=256,
                       help='Batch size for sentence splitter model')
    
    # DataLoader 参数
    parser.add_argument('--dataloader_batch_size', type=int, default=32,
                       help='Batch size for DataLoader')
    parser.add_argument('--num_workers', type=int, default=4,
                       help='Number of workers for DataLoader')
    parser.add_argument('--load_to_memory', action='store_true',
                       help='Load all data to memory (faster but uses more RAM)')
    
    # 分片参数
    parser.add_argument('--max_shard_size_gb', type=float, default=2.0,
                       help='Maximum size of each output shard in GB')
    
    args = parser.parse_args()
    
    # 初始化分布式环境
    rank, world_size, local_rank = setup_distributed()
    
    # 运行处理
    process_with_dataloader(args, rank, world_size, local_rank)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
```

## 核心改进说明

### 1. **ShardedWriter 类**
```python
class ShardedWriter:
    """自动分片写入器"""
    
    def write(self, data: Dict):
        line = json.dumps(data, ensure_ascii=False) + '\n'
        line_size = len(line.encode('utf-8'))
        
        # 超过2GB自动创建新文件
        if self.current_size + line_size > self.max_shard_size_bytes:
            self._create_new_shard()
        
        self.current_file.write(line)
        self.current_size += line_size
```

### 2. **文件命名策略**

处理过程中的临时文件：
```
part-rank0000-shard0000.jsonl  (rank 0 的第1个分片)
part-rank0000-shard0001.jsonl  (rank 0 的第2个分片)
part-rank0001-shard0000.jsonl  (rank 1 的第1个分片)
...
```

最终重命名为：
```
sample-10BT-part-000.jsonl
sample-10BT-part-001.jsonl
sample-10BT-part-002.jsonl
...
```

### 3. **处理流程**

```
1. 每个rank独立处理数据
   ├─ 写入时自动检查文件大小
   ├─ 超过2GB创建新分片
   └─ 生成临时文件: part-rankXXXX-shardYYYY.jsonl

2. 所有rank完成后（barrier同步）
   
3. Rank 0 收集所有分片
   ├─ 按名称排序
   ├─ 重命名为 sample-10BT-part-XXX.jsonl
   └─ 打印每个文件的大小
```

- 便于设置断点和单步调试
- 适合开发和调试代码逻辑

### 2. **Multi GPU Debug**
- `nproc_per_node=8`：使用8个GPU
- 测试完整的分布式流程
- 注意：多进程调试较困难，主要用于测试运行

### 3. **Small Test**
- 小batch size、小文件大小
- `num_workers=0`：避免子进程干扰调试
- `max_shard_size_gb=0.1`：快速测试分片逻辑
- 输出到测试目录

### 4. **Direct Python (No DDP)**
- 不使用 torchrun，直接运行Python脚本
- 最容易调试，但不会测试分布式逻辑
- 适合调试数据处理和模型推理部分

import sys
import logging
from pathlib import Path

def setup_logger(rank: int, output_dir: Path, log_to_file: bool = True):
    """为每个rank设置独立的logger"""
    
    logger = logging.getLogger(f"rank_{rank}")
    logger.setLevel(logging.INFO)
    logger.handlers.clear()
    
    # 创建格式化器
    formatter = logging.Formatter(
        f'[Rank {rank}] [%(asctime)s] [%(levelname)s] %(message)s',
        datefmt='%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'
    )
    
    # 控制台输出（带rank前缀）
    console_handler = logging.StreamHandler(sys.stdout)
    console_handler.setFormatter(formatter)
    logger.addHandler(console_handler)
    
    # 文件输出（每个rank独立文件）
    if log_to_file:
        log_dir = output_dir / "logs"
        log_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
        
        file_handler = logging.FileHandler(
            log_dir / f"rank_{rank:04d}.log",
            mode='w',
            encoding='utf-8'
        )
        file_handler.setFormatter(formatter)
        logger.addHandler(file_handler)
    
    return logger

def redirect_stdout_stderr(rank: int, output_dir: Path):
    """将stdout和stderr重定向到文件"""
    log_dir = output_dir / "logs"
    log_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    
    # 重定向stdout
    stdout_file = log_dir / f"rank_{rank:04d}_stdout.log"
    sys.stdout = open(stdout_file, 'w', encoding='utf-8', buffering=1)
    
    # 重定向stderr
    stderr_file = log_dir / f"rank_{rank:04d}_stderr.log"
    sys.stderr = open(stderr_file, 'w', encoding='utf-8', buffering=1)

# 在 process_with_dataloader 函数开始处添加

## 方案2：实时日志查看工具

创建一个日志查看脚本 `watch_logs.py`：

```python
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
实时查看多个rank的日志
用法: python watch_logs.py <log_dir> [--ranks 0,1,2]
"""

import argparse
import sys
import time
from pathlib import Path
from collections import defaultdict
import select

class MultiRankLogViewer:
    def __init__(self, log_dir: Path, ranks: list = None):
        self.log_dir = log_dir
        self.ranks = ranks
        self.files = {}
        self.positions = defaultdict(int)
        
    def find_log_files(self):
        """查找所有rank的日志文件"""
        if self.ranks:
            log_files = [
                self.log_dir / f"rank_{rank:04d}.log"
                for rank in self.ranks
            ]
        else:
            log_files = sorted(self.log_dir.glob("rank_*.log"))
        
        return [f for f in log_files if f.exists()]
    
    def watch(self):
        """实时监控日志"""
        log_files = self.find_log_files()
        
        if not log_files:
            print(f"No log files found in {self.log_dir}")
            return
        
        print(f"Watching {len(log_files)} log files...")
        print("=" * 80)
        
        # 打开所有文件
        for log_file in log_files:
            self.files[log_file] = open(log_file, 'r')
        
        try:
            while True:
                has_new_content = False
                
                for log_file, f in self.files.items():
                    # 读取新内容
                    f.seek(self.positions[log_file])
                    lines = f.readlines()
                    
                    if lines:
                        has_new_content = True
                        for line in lines:
                            print(line, end='')
                        
                        # 更新位置
                        self.positions[log_file] = f.tell()
                
                if not has_new_content:
                    time.sleep(0.1)
                    
        except KeyboardInterrupt:
            print("\nStopped watching logs")
        finally:
            for f in self.files.values():
                f.close()

def main():
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description='Watch multi-rank logs in real-time')
    parser.add_argument('log_dir', type=str, help='Directory containing log files')
    parser.add_argument('--ranks', type=str, default=None,
                       help='Comma-separated rank numbers to watch (default: all)')
    
    args = parser.parse_args()
    
    log_dir = Path(args.log_dir)
    if not log_dir.exists():
        print(f"Error: {log_dir} does not exist")
        sys.exit(1)
    
    ranks = None
    if args.ranks:
        ranks = [int(r) for r in args.ranks.split(',')]
    
    viewer = MultiRankLogViewer(log_dir, ranks)
    viewer.watch()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
```

使用方法：
```bash
# 监控所有rank
python watch_logs.py /path/to/output_dir/logs

# 只监控特定rank
python watch_logs.py /path/to/output_dir/logs --ranks 0,1,2
```

## 方案5：使用tmux分屏（Linux终端）

创建脚本 `launch_with_tmux.sh`：

```bash
#!/bin/bash

OUTPUT_DIR="/path/to/output_dir"
LOG_DIR="${OUTPUT_DIR}/logs"

# 启动训练（后台运行）
bash run_multinode_ddp.sh &
TRAIN_PID=$!

# 等待日志文件创建
echo "Waiting for log files..."
sleep 5

# 创建tmux会话
SESSION_NAME="ddp-logs"
tmux new-session -d -s ${SESSION_NAME}

# 分割窗口并监控不同rank
tmux split-window -h -t ${SESSION_NAME}
tmux split-window -v -t ${SESSION_NAME}
tmux select-pane -t 0
tmux split-window -v -t ${SESSION_NAME}

# 在每个窗格中tail不同的日志
tmux select-pane -t 0
tmux send-keys "tail -f ${LOG_DIR}/rank_0000.log" C-m

tmux select-pane -t 1
tmux send-keys "tail -f ${LOG_DIR}/rank_0001.log" C-m

tmux select-pane -t 2
tmux send-keys "tail -f ${LOG_DIR}/rank_0002.log" C-m

tmux select-pane -t 3
tmux send-keys "tail -f ${LOG_DIR}/rank_0003.log" C-m

# 附加到会话
tmux attach -t ${SESSION_NAME}
```

## 推荐实践方案

结合使用多种方法：

```bash
# 1. 启动训练（使用日志文件）
bash run_ddp.sh --log_to_file --redirect_output

# 2. 在另一个终端实时查看
python watch_logs.py ./logs

# 3. 或者在VSCode中打开所有日志文件
code logs/rank_*.log
```

## 最佳实践总结

| 场景 | 推荐方案 | 说明 |
|------|---------|------|
| 开发调试 | 方案1 + VSCode | 独立日志文件，易于回溯 |
| 实时监控 | 方案2 | 动态查看所有rank |
| 生产环境 | 方案1 + 方案5 | 稳定可靠，便于排查问题 |
| 快速查看 | tail -f logs/rank_*.log | 简单直接 |

选择哪种方案取决于你的具体需求！建议先实现方案1（独立日志文件），这样最灵活。
